text: Product: EcoBottle. Material: stainless steel. Capacity: 500ml.
EcoBottle comes with a leak-proof cap and is dishwasher-safe.
Shipping policy: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days in Singapore.
Shipping policy: Express shipping takes 1-2 business days in Singapore.
Return policy: Items can be returned within 30 days if unused and in original packaging.
Creator governance: Sponsored content must include the hashtag #ad in the first line.
Creator governance: Prohibited claims include medical cures and guaranteed earnings.
Product: FlexShoes. Material: recycled polyester. Sizes: EU 36-45.
FlexShoes are water-resistant and suitable for light rain.
Content quality: Product titles should avoid ALL CAPS and excessive punctuation.
